changeReason: Improved translation from Japanese. Old: "Search Notice"

TextENGNew: Jirou Tomitake (Deceased)
・Staying at a cheap hotel in Shishibone City.
changeReason: Old uses 'Resided in' implying permanent living arrangement; new uses 'Staying at' matching JPN 滞在 (temporary stay), which better reflects Tomitake's transient visits.

TextENGNew: ・Registered under the name Jirou Tomitake in the guest book@k　> Pen name
changeReason: New adds 'in the guest book' matching JPN 宿帳に (in the guest register), specifying the investigative detail of where the name was recorded.

TextENGNew: ・Traveled by folding bicycle.@kNo driver's license.
・Bicycle found abandoned at the side of a forest road, 300 meters from the scene.
・Present at the festival grounds on the day of the incident.
changeReason: New adds 'at the festival grounds' matching JPN 会場にいた (was at the venue), providing the specific location detail present in the Japanese.

TextENGNew: ・Was in the company of the missing Miyo Takano.
・Spotted by a police officer around 9 PM. Whereabouts afterwards unknown.
・Has been visiting Hinamizawa for the past 5–6 years, staying for about one week each season.
・Freelance photographer specializing in wild birds@k　> Check with the magazine publishers!
・Nothing suspicious found on the film among his belongings.
・Wallet found among his belongings@k　> Simple assault?
・Based on the contents of his wallet, his home base appears to be the Tokyo–Chiba area.
・No person matching the name "Jirou Tomitake" found in the resident registries of any Tokyo ward.
・Cross-reference dental records with Tokyo dentists@k　> Send to Metropolitan Police
・Send facial photograph@k　> To Metropolitan Police
・Inquire about "Jirou Tomitake" with various magazine publishers.
Miyo Takano (Missing)
・Nurse employed at Irie Clinic.
・Became acquainted with Tomitake through their shared interest in photographing wild birds.
changeReason: Old says 'close' while new says 'acquainted'; JPN 親しい means close/familiar, so the new translation understates the relationship level described in the Japanese.

TextENGNew: ・Residence: X district, XXX, Okinomiya.@kUnmarried.
・Witnessed alongside Tomitake at the festival grounds. Currently missing.
・Abducted?@k　Or a suspect?@k　> Important person of interest!
・No apparent motive to kill the deceased@k　> Lovers' quarrel?
changeReason: Old translates 痴情のもつれ as 'squabble from jealousy' while new uses 'lovers' quarrel,' which is the standard meaning of the Japanese idiom and implies a romantic/sexual relationship rather than mere jealousy.

TextENGNew: ・Investigate their personal relationships thoroughly!@k　> Workplace, etc.
・Re-interview the police officers who were on security duty at the venue!
changeReason: New correctly specifies 'police officers who were on security duty at the venue' matching JPN 会場警備の警察官 (venue security police), whereas old vaguely says 'police on scene.'
